textByHashes.68f0da13039d9d63225b9e3365672c909e27463f: Welcome, friends. You chosen few stand here because you have proven yourselves to be worthy. Here, you will not just find a home, you will find a family. Together, this family will bring about the Final Dawn.
textByHashes.b00025a58e4286a1428d04bba01672becbb79ad7: No doubt you are wondering how we will achieve our destiny. I call upon our glorious leader, the Augur, to explain our holy mission.
textByHashes.46fa1b79c2642af6886251b66240b036c45f98ed: Welcome, acolyte, and congratulations on your initiation. I am just making the final preparations on the duties for you and your companion. They will be ready shortly.
textByHashes.c7245ec0b51084a154df607bd94653d4c7efbf36: Welcome, acolytes. Congratulations on your initiation.
textByHashes.eff71add5865205b4d912a173aae6e501dac3f97: I am glad to see you are so eager. We have an essential task for you to help perform. The completion of this task may well be essential in us finding a route to Mokhaiotl.
textByHashes.31022807d20f32936a7288918b0e690880183ec2: After the Augur was blessed with glorious purpose, she felt a calling to this place. She came to this fallen temple and built us a home. However, it was not the temple that called to her, but what lies below.
textByHashes.595cd3f4a61bb8a79edb259287551847066a203a: This temple was built atop Tapoyauik, a ruined fortress of the Old Ones. They walked the world during the last cycle, and when the time came for their cycle to end, they embraced their destiny willingly.
textByHashes.e2925858b926cbe53d2e7ab5558964f9985578e1: Of course! They basked in the glory of Ralos and Ranul and united with them as one, but before they did, they left behind the secrets needed to ensure that we too could fulfil our purpose.
textByHashes.145eac9ad6a1eca464c63b51bfb02e6871a6f708: She did, but there is more to be uncovered. That is where you come in. Tapoyauik is a hostile environment and the passage into the ruins has been blocked.
textByHashes.f07a293a30fa824ea0bfcd8abb89c4b287a03ee5: Head below and support the efforts in opening the path once more. Do this, and you will be rewarded by Ralos and Ranul themselves!
textByHashes.1925c4425638f9a7e0e9404b25d6178c80fe93fb: Welcome back, acolytes. You should head below and support the efforts in opening the path into Tapoyauik. Do this, and you will be rewarded by Ralos and Ranul themselves!
